name: novel_design_planner
description: Creates comprehensive design checklists for web novels including character design, world building, power systems, plot structure, and story elements. Invoke when user needs novel design planning, character creation, world building, or story element design.
instructions: Based on the provided track and user preferences, create detailed character designs
Develop comprehensive world-building elements including setting and rules
Design balanced power systems with clear progression paths
Create plot structure with clear conflict and resolution arcs
Ensure all design elements align with the chosen track and target audience
